common.siteDescription: Your Trusted Partner in Chemical Distribution Solutions
common.confirmCancelRequest: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?
common.cancelRequestDescription: Once cancelled, the recipient will no longer see this request.

home.heroTitle: Connecting the Global Chemical Supply Chain
home.heroSubtitle: CHEMICALOOP connects 1,000+ local agents worldwide, covering 50+ countries and regions, with access to 3,000+ factories. Whether you're selling or purchasing, we provide professional services to help you find the best business opportunities in the global market.
home.heroSubtitle2: Become a CHEMICALOOP agent and connect with 1,000+ partners worldwide. Factory owners can promote their products globally, while sales elites can sell our full product range. We provide quality assurance and qualification support to jointly expand the international chemical market.
home.introText1: CHEMICALOOP Chemicaloop is a professional global chemical trade linkage platform, deeply rooted in the field of cross-border chemical trade.
home.introText2: We provide comprehensive localization landing services for global chemical enterprises.
home.introText3: Facing the global demand for chemical industry expansion, we continuously recruit chemical trade agents worldwide.
home.introPoint4: Backed by China's Manufacturing & Consumer Market
home.introPoint4Desc: China's manufacturing advantage and market potential
home.videoSubtitle: Discover how Chemicaloop connects global chemical trade

featuresQuality.title: Premium Quality
featuresQuality.description: We source only the highest quality chemicals from certified manufacturers worldwide.

featuresReliability.title: Reliable Supply
featuresReliability.description: Our extensive global network ensures consistent and timely delivery of your orders.

featuresExpertise.title: Industry Expertise
featuresExpertise.description: Decades of experience in chemical distribution across various industries.

agent.title: Global Agent
agent.subtitle: Join Our Global Agent Network
agent.introText: CHEMICALOOP is building a global network of chemical trade agents. As an agent, you'll have access to our extensive supplier database, competitive pricing, and professional support team.
agent.introText2: Whether you're an experienced chemical trader or new to the industry, we provide the tools and resources you need to succeed in the global chemical market.

1.title: Competitive Commission
1.description: Earn attractive commissions on every successful transaction with our transparent pricing structure.

2.title: Global Network
2.description: Connect with suppliers and buyers from over 50 countries, expanding your business reach worldwide.

3.title: Professional Support
3.description: Get dedicated support from our experienced team for sourcing, logistics, and quality assurance.

requirements.1: Valid business license or trading company registration
requirements.2: Experience in chemical trading or related industry
requirements.3: Strong network of potential buyers or suppliers
requirements.5: Commitment to quality and customer service

1.title: Submit Application
1.description: Fill out the application form with your business details

2.title: Review
2.description: Our team reviews your application within 3-5 days

3.title: Agreement
3.description: Sign the agent agreement and complete onboarding

4.title: Get Started
4.description: Access our platform and start connecting with partners

agent.ctaSubtitle: Start your journey as a CHEMICALOOP agent today
agent.applyText: Ready to join our global agent network? Fill out the application form and our team will review your application within 3-5 business days.
agent.contactText: Have questions about our agent program? Feel free to reach out to our team.

messages.defaultGreetingMessage: Hi, I'd like to connect with you on Chemicaloop. Looking forward to our collaboration!

messages.ifAcceptedCanExchange: If they accept, you can view their instant messaging contacts (WhatsApp, WeChat, etc.)
messages.contactsWillAppear: Both contacts will appear in your IM Contacts list
